app_info.name: PLOS — Personal Life Operating System
app_info.description: An AI-powered personal command center mobile app managing finance, career, safety, and health.
app_info.architecture: Single user mobile app. React Native Expo. Bottom tab navigation.

theme.vibe: Premium, authoritative, precise, ambient, data-dense but minimalist.

rules: Use IBM Plex Mono for all financial figures, scores, and exact data points.
Overlines must have heavy letter spacing (tracking-widest).
Mobile-first spacing: generous internal padding for cards (p-5 or 20px).
Use optical alignment for icons and text.
Avoid 100% full-width cards without side margins; keep them contained within the 20px horizontal padding.

ai_advice_card.glow: Subtle inner shadow or top border highlight using colors.brand.primary

motion_interactions.navigation: Smooth React Navigation transitions (spring or slide-from-right).
motion_interactions.buttons: Scale down to 0.97 on press using Pressable.
motion_interactions.ai_loading: Use pulsing opacity on the AI badge or skeleton loaders for data fetching.

rules: Stroke width: 1.5 for regular, 2.0 for active states.
Size: 24px for bottom tabs, 20px for inline icons.

splash_background.description: Dark blue abstract liquid texture for splash screen or high-end AI processing states.

empty_state_bg.description: Abstract monochrome glass block texture for empty state backgrounds.

accessibility_and_testing.test_attributes: All interactive elements MUST use `testID` (e.g., testID='login-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text contrast must meet WCAG AA standards. Muted text should not fall below 4.5:1 ratio against surface backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent.styling_approach: Use NativeWind (Tailwind for React Native) or strict React Native StyleSheet mapping to these design tokens.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_structure: Ensure SafeAreaView is used. Bottom tabs must account for safe area insets.
instructions_to_main_agent.bento_implementation: For Home screen dashboard, use View components with Flexbox (flex-row, flex-wrap) to create Bento box layouts.
instructions_to_main_agent.ai_chat_interface: The Chatbot screen should use inverted message bubbles: User (surface color), AI (deep blue #1E40AF with glow).
instructions_to_main_agent.dark_mode: Since it's a strictly dark-mode capable app (and requested as dark mode), prioritize the dark theme variables. Ensure no white flashes on navigation.
